description: Classical and essential book in Aqeedah of Ibn Taymiyyah (d 728H) taught in English by Taqweem Aslam Hafidhahullaah using the explanation of Shaykh Abdul Azeez Rashid with supporting material of Shaykh Fawzan, Shaykh Ibn Uthaymeen and others. The following audios are corrupted: 07, 11, 12, 13, 14 Source: http://www.learnaboutislam.co.uk/2013/04/21/sharh-al-aqeedat-il-wasitiyah-of-shaykh-al-islam-ibn-taymiyyah-taqweem-aslam/ PDFs include : Explanation of Aqeedah Wasitiyyah of  1 - Shaykh Khalil Harras Rahimahullaah 2 - Shaykh Ibn Uthaymeen Rahimahullaah  3 - Shaykh Fawzan Hafidhahullaah  4 - Also, an explanation of a summary of Aqeedah Hamawiyyah of Shaykh Ibn Uthaymeen Rahimahullaah. Once can subsequently also benefit from the following:  The classical book Aqeedah Tahaawiyyah taught in English by Abu Iyaad Amjad Rafiq using the explanations of Shaykh Saalih al-Fawzaan & Shaykh Saalih Aal ash-Shaykh Hafidhahumullaah from -  https://archive.org/details/tahawi_201701/01.mp3 For an ongoing lecture series on Aqeedah Wasitiyyah by brother Abu Idrees Hafidhahullaah - http://www.salafisounds.com/aqidatul-wasitiyyah-with-the-explanation-of-shaykh-ahmad-an-najmi-by-abu-idrees/
